title: SD Card Log Record
description: A single telemetry record written to the MicroSD card by the ESP32

vehicle_id.description: Unique identifier for the vehicle (configured in config.h)

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp from DS3231 RTC

dtcs.description: List of active Diagnostic Trouble Codes (OBD-II format)

engine_rpm.description: Engine RPM at time of reading (null if engine off)

test_active.description: True if a 20-minute gas test was in progress at recording time

test_result.description: Gas test result (populated at end of test only)
